name: mirofish
description: MiroFish — swarm-intelligence prediction engine (documents → graph → OASIS simulation → reports)

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check app tests
scripts.dev: kill-port 5001 && concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "green,cyan" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
